Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Silverreach]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Silverreach is a town that the ship is traveling toward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Silverreach was built on Ach’magut’s tomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Silverreach is an abandoned, Elder-haunted village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Silverreach is a place where people are welcomed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Silverreach is a location where the Sleepless dragged Jerri's crew through the streets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Silverreach is a location where an escape occurred through night-shrouded streets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Silverreach is a town located three hours from where Foster found Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Silverreach is a location with streets made of rough cobblestones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Silverreach contains streets of 'empty' buildings and resembles a hive.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Contact has been lost with the city of Silverreach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Silverreach was built over an ancient library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Silverreach is a town with an abandoned lighthouse on a hill overlooking it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Silverreach is a town located on the continent of Izyria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Silverreach is isolated by a mysterious barrier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Silverreach is a town.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Silverreach is a location mentioned in the past.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — Silverreach is a location above which Shera maneuvered herself to strike.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Silverreach is a town where Ach'magut began to stir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Silverreach is a harbor town with sloped, tiled roofs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Silverreach contains a lighthouse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Silverreach is a town that was destroyed by fire.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
